title: Litany of the Saints
author: John D. Becker
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Lord, have mercy. Christ, have mercy. Christ, have mercy. Lord, have mercy. Lord, have mercy.

title: Psalm 130: 1-2, 3-4, 5-6, 7-8
author: Owen Alstott
snippet: With the Lord there is mercy and fullness of redemption. With the Lord there is mercy and fullness of redemption.

title: Gospel Acclamation
author: John 11:25
snippet: I am the resurrection and the life, says the Lord; Whoever believes in me, even if he dies, will never die.

title: Hosea
author: Weston Priory/Gregory Norbet
snippet: Come back to me with all your heart. Don’t let fear keep us apart. Trees do bend, though straight and tall; so must we to others’ call.

title: The Temple of My Heart
author: Suno/Jim Ngo
snippet: My King, I kneel here before You In the silence, I come to adore You With a spirit made new by Your grace In the light of Your holy embrace.

title: Shepherd Me, O God
author: Marty Haugen
snippet: Shepherd me, O God, beyond my wants, beyond my fears, from death into life.

title: Into the Day
author: Suno/Jim Ngo
snippet: The stone is heavy, the air is still. We wait in shadows against our will. But hear the whisper, the holy breath, That speaks a promise in the face of death.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
